Thursday 18th March 2021

I am broken. Everything hurts. Want to do nothing. Must push on. 

NOTE: Today I recieved an email informing me that I have until 18th June to complete my Progression Panel and stay on my PhD.

MISSION: Complete sampling method + questions + 11am have meeting with Kate and Michelle

Today I have completed my sampling plan, had my meeting with Kate and Michelle, emailed questions to James, and emailed Anne my metadata analysis plan.


To Do List:
